protocols.Paper_title: Rapid, Sample-to-Answer Host Gene Expression Test to Diagnose Viral Infection
protocols.Evidence: FAST HR separates stabilized mRNA from debris; figure notes integrated centrifugal processing and E-Lysis, yielding medium suitable for qRT-PCR assays.

protocols.Paper_title: Rapid, Sample-to-Answer Host Gene Expression Test to Diagnose Viral Infection
protocols.Evidence: FAST HR process...centrifugally removing qRT-PCR inhibitors...RNase enzymes are inactivated by electrically-induced flash heating...qRT-PCR-ready matrix
